name: Incorrect Synchronization
description: The product utilizes a shared resource in a concurrent manner but does not correctly synchronize access to the resource, potentially leading to unexpected states and insecure behaviors when attackers influence the shared resource.
detection_pattern: STORAGE[shared_resource] or STRUCTURAL[shared_state] is accessed by multiple CONTROL[thread/process] paths concurrently without a CONTROL[synchronization] node (lock, mutex, semaphore) guarding the access, allowing race conditions on the shared resource
